data.title: Double Pyramid Trouble
data.statement:
Print a symmetric double pyramid pattern made of uppercase alphabet characters.

For each row [[i]] from {{1}} to [[N]], print the [[i]]-th uppercase letter of the alphabet repeated [[i]] times on both sides, with spaces between them so that the total width of the row is {{2 x }}[[N]].

For example, the first row starts with {{A}}, the second row with {{B}}, the third with {{C}}, and so on.

testCases.title: Test 1
testCases.testOut:
A      A
BB    BB
CCC  CCC
DDDDDDDD

data.stubGenerator:
read N:int
loop N
    write Print Each row
data.outputDescription: <<[[N]] lines>>: The double alphabet pyramid pattern of [[N]] rows.

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

Print a symmetric double pyramid pattern made of uppercase alphabet characters.

For each row i from 1 to N, print the i-th uppercase letter of the alphabet repeated i times on both sides, with spaces between them so that the total width of the row is 2 x N.

For example, the first row starts with A, the second row with B, the third with C, and so on.
Input
An integer N.
Output
N lines: The double alphabet pyramid pattern of N rows.
Constraints
1 ≤ N ≤ 26
Example
Input
4
Output
A      A
BB    BB
CCC  CCC
DDDDDDDD
